summary: Iteration 74: All 5 shell pages verified to use useSnapshot hook and render cognitive snapshot data correctly. CompliancePage shows risk/SPOFs/regulatory/alignment. ActionsPage shows resolution_queue with action buttons and priority focus. AutomationsPageAuth shows automatable actions and operational recommendations. ReportsPage shows weekly_brief/financial_snapshot/executive_memo. AuditLogPage builds audit log from resolution_queue + inevitabilities. All pages have correct data-testid attributes and no horizontal scroll on desktop.

issues: App boot loader 'Establishing secure connection...' shows for 45-60 seconds on initial load while cognitive snapshot data is fetched from Supabase Edge Function. This is expected behavior documented in iteration 73.

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 pages correctly use centralized useSnapshot() hook - no direct API calls
CognitiveMesh loading component shows appropriate loading messages on each page
Pages render correct slices of cognitive snapshot: risk, resolution_queue, execution.recs, weekly_brief, inevitabilities
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Modular rendering pattern maintained - each page extracts relevant data from cognitive object
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 complete. All 5 shell pages (CompliancePage, ActionsPage, AutomationsPageAuth, ReportsPage, AuditLogPage) verified to use useSnapshot hook and render cognitive snapshot data. Note: App boot loader takes 45-60 seconds for cognitive data to load from Supabase Edge Function. When testing via direct URL navigation, wait for full load before checking page content. All pages under /compliance, /actions, /automations, /reports, /audit-log routes are working correctly.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: CRM (HubSpot) is REAL via Merge.dev. Cognitive data comes from Supabase Edge Function (biqc-insights-cognitive).
